data.content: Planning complete for conversation log readability improvements. The plan covers two files (agent-history-view.tsx and interaction-picker.tsx) with systematic font size bumps (+1 step across all 4 size tiers), contrast upgrades (lighter text colors for secondary elements, stronger background opacity on entry cards), and minor icon size increases. All changes are Tailwind class replacements — no layout, spacing, or behavioral changes. Low risk, easily verified visually and via lint/typecheck.
